<user_query>
Task: "Comming soon stripe"
giờ tất cả các phần liên quan tới Stripe đều disabel, và show tooltip (Coming Soon) nhé
FE: disabel button và show tooltp/text coming soon
API thì báo 400 response nhé
</user_query>

NhomNhom is here.

Đang tìm mọi chỗ dùng Stripe trong dashboard và API để lên kế hoạch "Coming Soon" (FE: disable + tooltip; API: 400).
Đang kiểm tra account.tsx và cách dùng Tooltip trong project.
Đã rà soát toàn bộ chỗ dùng Stripe. Đang tạo kế hoạch chi tiết.

<attached_files>

<code_selection path="file:///Users/vuongluu/.cursor/plans/stripe_coming_soon_84b300d9.plan.md" lines="1-120">
---
name: Stripe Coming Soon
overview: Disable all Stripe-related UI with "Coming Soon" tooltip/text and make all Stripe API routes return 400 with a consistent message.
todos: []
isProject: false
---

# Stripe "Coming Soon" — Disable UI + API 400

## Scope

- **FE**: Disable every Stripe-related button/link and show tooltip or text "Coming Soon".
- **API**: All Stripe routes (including webhook) return **400** with body `{ message: "Coming Soon" }` (or equivalent).

---

## 1. API — Return 400 for all Stripe routes

**File:** [apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe.routes.ts](apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe.routes.ts)

- Add an **onRequest** hook when registering the stripe router so that **every** request to `/stripe/`* (including `POST /stripe/webhook`) immediately responds with **400** and a body like `{ message: "Coming Soon" }`.
- Implementation: at the top of `stripeRoutes(server)`, call `server.addHook('onRequest', async (request, reply) => reply.status(400).send({ message: 'Coming Soon' }))`. This runs before any route handler, so no Stripe logic runs.
- No changes to [stripe.service.ts](apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe.service.ts), [stripe-connect.service.ts](apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe-connect.service.ts), or [stripe.webhook.ts](apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe.webhook.ts) are required.

---

## 2. Frontend — TooltipProvider at root (optional but recommended)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/main.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/main.tsx)

- Wrap the app (e.g. inside `ThemeProvider`) with `TooltipProvider` from `@/components/ui/tooltip` so Tooltips work on any page without per-page wrappers.

---

## 3. Frontend — Disable Stripe actions and show "Coming Soon"

### 3.1 Quest fund page (Stripe flow)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/fund.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/fund.tsx)

- In `StripeFundFlow`, disable the **"Pay with Card →"** button (e.g. `disabled={true}` or `disabled`), and wrap it in `Tooltip` with content **"Coming Soon"** so the button is not clickable and shows the tooltip on hover/focus.

### 3.2 Create/Edit Quest — Reward step (Fiat option)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create-quest/StepReward.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create-quest/StepReward.tsx)

- Disable the **Fiat (USD)** pill/button (the one that does `onFieldChange("rail", "fiat")`). Wrap it in `Tooltip` with **"Coming Soon"** so users cannot select Fiat. Options: use a wrapper that prevents `onClick` and shows tooltip, or render the pill as disabled with `aria-disabled` and tooltip.

### 3.3 Create/Edit Quest — Preview step (Pay with Card button)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create-quest/StepPreview.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create-quest/StepPreview.tsx)

- When `form.rail === "fiat"`, the **"Save & Pay with Card →"** / **"Update & Pay with Card →"** button should be **disabled** and wrapped in `Tooltip` **"Coming Soon"**. The existing text "Stripe integration coming soon" can remain; the main change is disabling the primary fiat submit button and adding tooltip.

### 3.4 Stripe Connect page

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/stripe-connect.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/stripe-connect.tsx)

- Add a clear **banner or heading** at the top: e.g. **"Stripe Connect — Coming Soon"**.
- **Disable** both action buttons: **"Connect Stripe Account →" / "Complete Onboarding →"** and **"Open Stripe Dashboard"**, and wrap each in `Tooltip` with **"Coming Soon"** (so they are not clickable).

### 3.5 Quest manage page (Distribute / Refund for fiat)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/manage.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/manage.tsx)

- When `isFiatFunded === true`, **disable** the **"Distribute Payout"** and **"Refund"** buttons and wrap each in `Tooltip` **"Coming Soon"** so creators cannot trigger Stripe distribute/refund.

### 3.6 Account — Fiat Payout section

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/account.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/account.tsx)

- In `FiatPayoutSection`, **disable** the **"Connect Stripe Account"** / **"Complete Setup"** and **"Open Stripe Dashboard"** buttons and wrap each in `Tooltip` **"Coming Soon"**. The "Details" link to `/stripe-connect` can remain (user will see the Coming Soon state on that page).

### 3.7 GitHub Bounties — Fund button (USD)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/github-bounties/mine.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/github-bounties/mine.tsx)

- For the **"Fund"** button shown when `bounty.rewardType === "USD"` and `bounty.fundingStatus === "unfunded"`, **disable** the button and wrap in `Tooltip` **"Coming Soon"** (Stripe checkout for bounties is disabled).

### 3.8 Fund success page (optional)

**File:** [apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/fund-success.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/fund-success.tsx)

- If the session fetch returns **400** and the response body indicates "Coming Soon", show a friendly message (e.g. "Stripe payments are coming soon") instead of the error state, so users who land here (e.g. old bookmark) see a clear message. Low priority if redirect from Stripe is already disabled.

---

## 4. Other FE touchpoints (no code change or minimal)

- **Quest detail** ([apps/dashboard/src/routes/_public/quests/detail.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_public/quests/detail.tsx)): "Fund Quest" for draft stripe quests links to the fund page, where the Stripe flow is already disabled. "Set up Stripe" links to `/stripe-connect`, which will show Coming Soon. No change required.
- **Dashboard** ([apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/dashboard.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/dashboard.tsx)): "Set up Stripe" link can stay; destination page shows Coming Soon.
- **Authenticated layout** ([apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated.tsx)): Nav links to **Stripe Payout** (`/stripe-connect`) can remain; the page itself shows Coming Soon and disabled actions.

---

## 5. Verification

- **API**: Call any Stripe endpoint (e.g. `GET /stripe/connect/status` with auth, `POST /stripe/webhook`) and confirm response is **400** with body containing "Coming Soon".
- **FE**: Manually check: fund page (Stripe card button disabled + tooltip), create quest (Fiat disabled, Pay with Card disabled + tooltip), stripe-connect page (banner + disabled buttons + tooltips), manage page (fiat quest: Distribute/Refund disabled + tooltips), account Fiat section (buttons disabled + tooltips), GitHub bounties mine (Fund disabled + tooltip for USD).

---

## Summary

| Area                     | Action                                                                      |
| ------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| API stripe routes        | `onRequest` hook → 400 `{ message: "Coming Soon" }` for all `/stripe/`*     |
| main.tsx                 | Add `TooltipProvider` at root (recommended)                                 |
| fund.tsx                 | Disable "Pay with Card", Tooltip "Coming Soon"                              |
| StepReward.tsx           | Disable Fiat (USD) pill, Tooltip "Coming Soon"                              |
| StepPreview.tsx          | Disable fiat "Save/Update & Pay with Card", Tooltip "Coming Soon"           |
| stripe-connect.tsx       | Banner "Coming Soon", disable both buttons, Tooltip "Coming Soon"           |
| manage.tsx               | When fiat-funded, disable Distribute + Refund, Tooltip "Coming Soon"        |
| account.tsx              | FiatPayoutSection: disable Connect/Dashboard buttons, Tooltip "Coming Soon" |
| github-bounties/mine.tsx | Disable "Fund" for USD bounties, Tooltip "Coming Soon"                      |
| fund-success.tsx         | (Optional) Handle 400 → show "Stripe coming soon" message                   |

</code_selection>

</attached_files>
<user_query>
Stripe "Coming Soon" — Disable UI + API 400

Implementing the Stripe "Coming Soon" plan step by step. Checking existing todos, then applying changes.
Running API and dashboard builds to verify compilation:
Fixing unused variable errors: prefixing unused mutation variables with an underscore.
Removing the unused dashboard mutation from both files.
Builds passed. Updating CHANGELOG and adding a session log per project rules:

Summary of what was implemented:

**API**
- **[apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe.routes.ts](apps/api/src/modules/stripe/stripe.routes.ts)**  
  - Added an `onRequest` hook at the start of the Stripe router so **every** request to `/stripe/*` (including the webhook) returns **400** with body `{ message: "Coming Soon" }` and no route handler runs.

**Frontend**
- **[apps/dashboard/src/main.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/main.tsx)**  
  - Wrapped the app in `TooltipProvider` so tooltips work everywhere.
- **Quest fund (Stripe flow)** — [fund.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/fund.tsx): “Pay with Card” is disabled and wrapped in a tooltip “Coming Soon”.
- **Create/Edit Quest**  
  - [StepReward.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create-quest/StepReward.tsx): Fiat (USD) pill is non-clickable and has tooltip “Coming Soon”.  
  - [StepPreview.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/create-quest/StepPreview.tsx): When rail is fiat, “Save & Pay with Card” / “Update & Pay with Card” is disabled with tooltip “Coming Soon”.
- **Stripe Connect** — [stripe-connect.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/stripe-connect.tsx): Top banner “Stripe Connect — Coming Soon”; Connect/Complete Onboarding and Open Stripe Dashboard are disabled with tooltip “Coming Soon”. Unused dashboard mutation removed.
- **Quest manage** — [manage.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/manage.tsx): For fiat-funded quests, “Distribute Payout” and “Refund” are disabled with tooltip “Coming Soon”.
- **Account Fiat Payout** — [account.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/account.tsx): Connect/Complete Setup and Open Stripe Dashboard are disabled with tooltip “Coming Soon”. Unused dashboard mutation removed.
- **GitHub Bounties (My Bounties)** — [mine.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/github-bounties/mine.tsx): “Fund” for USD bounties is disabled with tooltip “Coming Soon”.
- **Fund success** — [fund-success.tsx](apps/dashboard/src/routes/_authenticated/quests/$questId/fund-success.tsx): If the session API returns 400 with “Coming Soon”, the page shows “Stripe Payments Coming Soon” and links back to quest/browse.

**Docs**
- **docs/CHANGELOG.md** — Added v0.15.1 entry for Stripe Coming Soon.
- **.team/sessions/stripe-coming-soon-2026-03-12.md** — Session log for this work.

API and dashboard builds complete successfully. To turn Stripe back on later, remove the `onRequest` hook in `stripe.routes.ts` and re-enable the buttons (and optionally restore the dashboard mutation in account and stripe-connect).
